title: Experiences | Spiritual Services
description: Unified experiences auto-linked with calendar dates and videos.
text: Experiences | Spiritual Services Unified Experiences Services auto-linked with calendar dates and videos using shared tags. Help: How Experiences Work Show Golden rule: Tags are the glue. If tags don't match, items won't link. 🛕 Service data/services.json 🏷️ Shared Tags shiv / ram / tour 📅 Next Date data/calendar.json 🎥 Related Video data/videos.json How to add new items Add a service in data/services.json with tags. Add a calendar occasion in data/calendar.json with the same tags. Add a video in data/videos.json with the same tags (or add its youtubeId in service.relatedVideos). Reload — cards auto-update. // service { "id":"rudrabhishek", "tags":["shiv"], "relatedVideos":["_hasaKTG3vw"] } // calendar { "date":"2026-02-14", "tags":["shiv"] } // video { "youtubeId":"_hasaKTG3vw", "tags":["shiv"] } Featured Auto from upcoming occasions (Calendar) with fallback to curated featured flags. Experiences Auto-linked cards (service + next date + video + WhatsApp CTA). 
